raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Post-launch context","name":"Before we get into specifics, what’s been most on your mind since the feature shipped?","description":"Lets Priya set the frame after launch without presuming a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet this week","name":"I noticed you’ve been quieter this week, what’s behind that?","description":"Uses an observation-first check to distinguish recovery from something unresolved.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team presence","name":"How has the team part of your week felt since the launch?","description":"Surfaces whether she’s re-entered the team rhythm or is still in recovery mode.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next quarter shape","name":"What do you see yourself owning next quarter?","description":"Gets her to name the shape of her upcoming scope before any new work is introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Scope tradeoff","name":"What would you rather not carry next quarter?","description":"Forces a trade-off around ownership and makes room for prioritisation.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring intent","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week?","description":"Turns a vague aspiration into a concrete shape and tests whether it is realistic now.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring blocker","name":"What has kept the mentoring thread from moving?","description":"Surfaces the practical reason that a stated interest never turned into action.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would you want more of from me right now?","description":"Finds the specific support she wants without assuming the answer.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-two-weeks focus","name":"What would make the next two weeks feel smoother for you?","description":"Closes by converting the conversation into a concrete support need or adjustment.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
